data.name: Adverse Effects
data.detailed_description:
Working two jobs and not getting much sleep, Judith decides to visit her doctor, who prescribes her some experimental sleeping pills. Shortly after taking her first pill, she starts to feel some Adverse Effects, which leave her yearning for you. Confused by her new feelings, she decides to stop taking the new drug, but the effects have already taken hold, and she can no longer fight her new urges. You play the recipient of these feelings; what will you do when her normal affections turn into something more?

Gameplay Includes:
  • 590+ Full HD Renders
  • 55+ Full HD Animations
  • 7,000+ Lines of Script
  • 30,000+ Words






Features Bush Selector!
What is a bush selector? For Judith, you'll be able to select what kind of pubic hair she has, be it shaved, trimmed or full bush.

Features:
  • Define Your Own Relationships
  • Steam Achievements
  • Full Music/Audio System
  • Story Altering Choices
  • Compelling Story

data.short_description: Judith has been having issues sleeping, so her solution was to see her doctor. The doctor prescribed her some new sleeping pills that have some Adverse Effects. You play the recipient of these feelings; what will you do when her normal affections turn into something more?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 義大利文, 德文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 Onwards
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
